content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all changes across task_prompt_contract.rs, review_classification.rs, engine.rs, and prompt_builder_test.rs. The implementation correctly: (1) splits extract_pe_bead_ids into canonical-only and short-form-inclusive variants with clean internal refactoring, (2) tightens prompt_has_canonical_scope_sections to require full shape validation (not just marker presence), (3) switches render_scope_guidance to use canonical-only IDs for planner-facing output, (4) fixes inject_scope_guidance to use rfind to handle prompts containing embedded '## Authoritative JSON Schema' headings in AGENTS guidance. All 1819 tests pass. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
